description_long: This house features a striking geometric design with bold black and white striped patterns covering the main building and surrounding yard. The property is enclosed by a black picket fence and includes a rectangular pool, a small wooden gate, and a unique sculptural tree-like structure made of white panels with brown accents. The roof is flat and striped, matching the rest of the house, while the yard is divided into angular sections of green and white. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a modern, avant-garde architectural style. Large, windowless facades dominate the exterior, emphasizing the graphic, high-contrast aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with bold black and white stripes, a flat roof, fenced yard, and sculptural tree feature. The design is geometric and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped facade, main entry, pool, fence, and sculptural tree feature.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat, striped roof, brick-textured side walls, and the sculptural tree's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the large, uninterrupted striped roof and the back of the sculptural tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the yard's angular pattern, pool, and the sculptural tree from another angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a striped door, small wooden gate, and no porch or overhang
